commitMapping: Each entry maps to the Git commit whose subject exactly matches commitSubject.

entries.summary: Established a conflict-safe standalone release repository with one JSON roadmap, machine-readable handoff and changelog, frozen source-input hashes, non-overlapping scope contracts, explicit Git ownership, and release security boundaries.
verification: Roadmap validation and next-step query passed.
Dispatch-wave validation passed with no conflicts.
Secret, binary, cache, toolchain, agent-log, and local-input ignore probes passed.

entries.summary: Made the pure Common Lisp kernel verifier standalone with fresh semantic and measured SBCL profiles, exact-integer lawful equality saturation, complete positive and fail-closed integration tests, contracts, and a validated Codex skill wrapper.
verification: Verifier integration suite passed 8 of 8 tests under isolated SBCL 2.6.6.
Lawful e-graph suite passed all 13 checks.
Mutation and benchmark mismatch were rejected before timing.
Compiler-warning and output-collision cases failed closed.
Skill metadata passed the skill-creator quick validator.
Core compiler files matched the frozen accepted inputs byte for byte.
